meaning: n.批发,趸售adj.批发的,[喻] 大规模的
examples: Warehouse clubs allow members to buy goods at wholesale prices.
We sell wholesale to several chains that sell retail to the public.
They are only doing what is necessary to prevent wholesale destruction of vegetation.
Its nonregulated wholesale operation supplies 7, 000 megawatts of power to customers like General Motors and Eastman Kodak.
French vintners have increased wholesale prices for new wine 50% and more over the past three years.
